sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_time DateTime64(9) DEFAULT toDateTime64('1970-01-01 00:00:00', 9, 'UTC'));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = toDateTime64('2022-01-01 12:00:00.000000000', 9, 'UTC') WHERE event_time = toDateTime64('2021-07-21 17:35:48.123456789', 9, 'UTC');
SELECT event_time, toUnixTimestamp64Nano(event_time) AS unix_timestamp FROM test_dates WHERE unix_timestamp > 0;
